description_long: This combat tactical vehicle is a futuristic, heavily-armored aircraft with a robust, angular design and a matte olive-green finish. The body is wide and low, featuring a cockpit with a dark, reinforced canopy at the front and multiple intakes and hatches along the sides. The vehicle is equipped with two large, downward-facing landing skids and a prominent tail section with a horizontal stabilizer and vertical fin. Visible weapon mounts are integrated into the front and side panels, suggesting offensive capabilities. The surface is smooth with subtle panel lines, and the overall build appears to prioritize both protection and firepower. Markings and numbers are present on the side, adding to its military appearance.
description: A futuristic, olive-green armored combat aircraft with landing skids, weapon mounts, and a reinforced cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the cockpit canopy, forward weapon mounts, and landing skids.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the side weapon mounts, military markings, and the length of the fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view displaying the tail fin, stabilizer, and rear landing skid structure.
description_view_3: Opposite front three-quarter view emphasizing the angular armor plating and cockpit area.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two visible weapon mounts: one on each side of the front fuselage, integrated into the angular panels, likely for machine guns or cannons.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; sloped surfaces for deflection; reinforced cockpit area and side panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive-green color with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White unit number '02' and small symbols on the side panels near the cockpit.
